description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a rich brown cover, reinforced at the corners and spine with glossy, amber-colored protective caps. The cover features a rectangular embossed panel in the center, giving it a classic, ornate appearance. Two ribbon bookmarks, one green and one red, protrude from the bottom edge, adding a touch of color and utility. The pages are slightly yellowed, suggesting age or frequent use, and the book's edges are well-defined and straight. The surface of the cover has a marbled texture, and the overall build appears sturdy and durable. No visible illustrations or text are present on the cover, giving it a timeless, scholarly look.
description: A thick, brown hardbound book with glossy amber corner protectors and two colored ribbon bookmarks. The cover is plain with a marbled texture and an embossed central panel.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the closed pages, two ribbon bookmarks (green and red), and the glossy amber corner protectors.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the front cover, highlighting the marbled brown surface, central embossed panel, and four amber corner protectors.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the book is visible, showing the page edges and the amber protectors, but no bookmarks.
description_view_3: The back cover is shown, featuring the marbled brown surface and two amber protectors along the spine.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with glossy amber protective caps at the top and bottom. No text or decorative patterns are visible.
